args.Description: Fix all identified bugs: 1) adv.specialties → adv.topSpecialties, 2) bottleneck calc uses || 10 fallback which makes 0-rated categories behave as 10, 3) retakeQuizBtn references quizCard which is out of scope at line 2116, 4) goToStep called from retakeBtn but quizCard/ratingBtns/updateHorizonVisuals/restorePathOpacities are out of scope too.
args.Instruction: Fix 1: adv.specialties[0] → adv.topSpecialties[0] on line 1629. Fix 2: bottleneck calc in goToStep uses || 10 fallback making unrated categories look like score 10 instead of score 0. Fix 3: retakeQuizBtn references quizCard which may be null - wrap in null check.

ReplacementChunks.ReplacementContent: stepDesc.innerText = `Matching your request with top-rated ${adv ? adv.topSpecialties[0] : 'relocation'} experts...`;
ReplacementChunks.TargetContent: stepDesc.innerText = `Matching your request with top-rated ${adv ? adv.specialties[0] : 'relocation'} experts...`;

args.ReplacementContent:
// Safe initials helper const getInitials = (name) => { if (!name) return 'U'; const parts = name.trim().split(/\s+/); if (parts.length >= 2) return parts[0][0].toUpperCase() + parts[1][0].toUpperCase(); return parts[0][0].toUpperCase(); }; const currentUserObj = user || (auth ? auth.currentUser : null); const initials = getInitials(currentUserObj?.displayName); navActions.innerHTML = `
${initials}
${initials}

args.Description: An extra `}` at line 2585 was closing the `if (quizCard)` / DOMContentLoaded scope too early, so ~3400 lines of event handlers (nav clicks, auth forms, quiz logic, etc.) ended up outside the callback and couldn't access scoped variables — causing the entire app to be non-interactive.
args.Instruction: Remove the extra closing brace at line 2585 that prematurely closes the DOMContentLoaded callback, causing all click handlers below it to be unreachable.
args.toolAction: Removing extra brace

args.Description: Restore the deleted `if (slide) {` condition inside the dynamic quiz controller. This fixes the brace mismatch causing the dangling `else` and runtime syntax error.
args.Instruction: Add the missing `if (slide) {` statement under `const slide = ...` inside the `goToStep` function.
args.toolAction: Restoring missing if statement in goToStep

args.Description: Restore the closing brace for `if (quizCard) {` that was previously removed. Since `if (slide) {` has been restored, this brace is now required to close the `if (quizCard)` block, ensuring that subsequent code remains correctly scoped inside the DOMContentLoaded callback but outside the quizCard conditional.
args.Instruction: Re-add the closing brace for `if (quizCard) {` before `// Quiz matching logic`.
args.toolAction: Restoring closing brace for quizCard check
